proposed.claim: Active behavioral directives are not cached to a digest file; load them live from the graph by querying active directives (`mix bs list directive`). Per cb:a386, a digest whose freshness depends on remembering to regenerate it is an antipattern that embeds the staleness it was meant to solve - render live from the DAG instead.

reasoning: cb-schema-v2: the query token changes with the type rename (bs list implication -> bs list directive); content otherwise unchanged.
